target.label: Claude PreToolUse hooks for secret-file denylist (Ralph-compatible)

rationale: Epic-2-substrate-claude-pretooluse-hooks class story (SIXTEENTH Epic 2 delivery; FIRST story shipping executable bash logic unit-testable inside the devbox without external dependencies — `.claude/hooks/block-secret-access.sh` is a functional bash script with `jq` JSON parsing + bash-regex denylist matching, distinct from Stories 2.1-2.15's configuration-only substrate deltas; Story 2.16 extends the NFR5a/5b security barrier DOWN one level from the Story 2.15 permissions-layer baseline to the hook layer, which covers the Ralph `claude -p --dangerously-skip-permissions` runtime path the permissions layer CANNOT cover — AC 6 of Story 2.15 becomes retroactively live-enforced at Story 2.16 landing) shipping 4 NEW files (`.claude/hooks/block-secret-access.sh` 181 lines bash + `.ralph/config.toml` + `docs/invariants/claude-hook-denylist.md` 138 lines + `packages/keel-templates/src/seeds/.claude/hooks/block-secret-access.sh` byte-identical seed) + 8 MODIFIED files (`.claude/settings.json` hooks.PreToolUse block append with 6 matchers Bash/Read/Edit/Write/Grep/Glob; `packages/keel-invariants/src/invariants.manifest.ts` 35th entry INV-claude-hook-secret-denylist; INVARIANTS.md new H3 between Story 2.14 + Story 2.2; AGENTS.md new H3 with 7 bullets; CLAUDE.md new bullet; packages/devbox/README.md new H2 with quick-start + fork-extension recipe; packages/keel-templates/src/seeds/.claude/settings.json re-synced; keel-templates README bullet append + AMEND). Ground-(a)+(b) hybrid conjunction with BROADENED ground-(a) posture (NOVEL for Epic 2) + PARTIAL ground-(c) variant-(ii) narrowed application: (a) substrate-verification covers all 8 ACs fully via functional substrate probes at iter-305 dev-story landing — AC 1 via `python3 -m json.tool` + top-level-keys probe + `jq '.hooks.PreToolUse | length' = 6` + matcher-set membership + permissions-byte-identity + seed byte-identity diff; AC 2 via `bash -n` parse + `chmod 0755` + **14 impl-time fixture smokes all GREEN** (5 AC-pinned: `env`/`Read(.envrc)`/`Read(/home/dev/.claude/.credentials.json)`/`Read(secrets.yaml)`/approve-path; 7 D-1/D-3/D-6/env/printenv/git-hook mitigation: recursive `**/.envrc*` + case-glob `cat*.envrc*|cat*/.envrc*` + explicit `cat*/home/dev/.claude/*` cat-parity + `printenv BASH_ENV` + `git commit --no-verify` bypass-block + Edit on `.claude/settings.json` + Edit on `.git/hooks/pre-commit`; 2 negative approve-path: `.envrc.example` schema-companion EXEMPT + innocuous `Read(package.json)`); AC 3 via smokes confirming `{"decision":"block","reason","match"}` + `{"decision":"approve"}` JSON shape + exit-0-always contract; AC 4 via smoke with `RALPH_BASE_DIR=/tmp/test RALPH_ITER_ID=test-iter-1` → JSONL file created matching schema + env-vars-unset skip-logging branch + `mkdir -p` idempotent; AC 5 via `[ -f .ralph/config.toml ]` + `grep -c "^self_protection_halt_threshold = 3$" = 1` + `[hooks]` table header 1 grep + `git check-ignore` exit 1 (not-gitignored); AC 6 via `pnpm keel-invariants:check-all` silent success (manifest ↔ INVARIANTS.md ↔ contentHash lockstep GREEN) + SHA256 `85f8a539c0850f1c52ed825c6a8a904d72c6d42c0c7a87eb9f14617bc51cd7e1` stable pin; AC 7 via fork-extension invocation grep in substrate hook + 7-site AMEND coordination pinned; AC 8 via JSONL schema pinned in invariant doc + story file Dev Notes + AGENTS.md H3 bullet.
